name: linkedin-company-admin-mcp
description: MCP server for LinkedIn Company Page administration - read analytics, manage posts, edit page details, grow followers, plus personal->company bridge tools for employee advocacy.
long_description: Exposes 24 MCP tools for the browser-first administration of a LinkedIn Company Page: read page/posts/followers/mentions/analytics, edit About/logo/details, publish/edit/delete/schedule posts, invite followers, list scheduled posts, and a small set of personal-profile bridge tools (tag the page, reshare, comment-as-admin, audit mentions) for employee-advocacy workflows. Complementary to stickerdaniel/linkedin-mcp-server.

user_data_dir.title: Browser profile directory
user_data_dir.description: Persistent Patchright profile used to keep you signed in. Chmod'd to 0o700 on first login.

tools.name: session_status
tools.description: Is the persistent profile live and logged in?

tools.name: session_warmup
tools.description: Pre-open the browser + /feed/ to reduce first-call latency.

tools.name: session_logout
tools.description: Close the browser and wipe the persistent profile directory.

tools.name: company_read_page
tools.description: Read page name, tagline, followers, about, industry, website.

tools.name: company_list_posts
tools.description: List recent posts with URN, text, reactions, and comment counts.

tools.name: company_list_followers
tools.description: List followers with headline + profile URL (admin only).

tools.name: company_list_mentions
tools.description: List admin notifications for posts that mentioned the page.

tools.name: company_manage_admins
tools.description: List page admins and their roles.

tools.name: company_analytics
tools.description: Followers / posts metrics for a 7d, 28d or 90d window.

tools.name: company_edit_about
tools.description: Update the About section (with tagline fallback).

tools.name: company_edit_logo
tools.description: Upload a new logo and optional banner image.

tools.name: company_update_details
tools.description: Update website, industry, size, and specialties.

tools.name: company_create_post
tools.description: Publish a text post with optional link or image.

tools.name: company_edit_post
tools.description: Replace the body of an existing post.

tools.name: company_delete_post
tools.description: Permanently delete a company post.

tools.name: company_schedule_post
tools.description: Publish a post at a future ISO-8601 datetime.

tools.name: company_reply_comment
tools.description: Reply as the page to a comment on one of your posts.

tools.name: company_reshare_post
tools.description: Reshare another post on the page with optional commentary.

tools.name: company_invite_to_follow
tools.description: Send follow invitations to 1st-degree connections.

tools.name: company_list_scheduled
tools.description: List posts queued for future publication.

tools.name: personal_tag_company
tools.description: Publish a personal post that @-mentions the company page.

tools.name: personal_reshare_company_post
tools.description: Reshare a company post on your personal profile.

tools.name: personal_comment_as_admin
tools.description: Comment on a company post as the page or as yourself.

tools.name: personal_read_company_mentions
tools.description: List your personal posts that tag the given company page.
